project_context.name: AI Employee SaaS
project_context.emotional_tone: Trustworthy, Service-Oriented, High-end Concierge, Authoritative (Not Synthetic AI)

rules.headings: MUST use tight letter spacing (tracking-tight). Never center by default. Use font-light or font-black to create visual tension.
rules.body: Loose leading (leading-relaxed) for readability. Use text-base for standard, text-sm for dashboard density.
rules.overlines: Uppercase, tiny text-xs, tracking-[0.2em] for labels and super-headers.
rules.hierarchy: H1 max text-5xl to text-6xl. Do not exceed these limits. Maintain hierarchy gap rule (max 2 Tailwind steps between H and sub-H).

rules.gradients: NO full-screen gradients. Use solid colors with noise/texture instead.
rules.contrast: Always tint neutral greys with a slight warm (orange) or cool (blue) undertone. Ensure WCAG AA contrast (4.5:1).

visual_enhancers.surfaces: Mix 'Crystal Glassmorphism' (bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl border-white/40) for floating chat widgets and sticky navs, with 'Flat Solid' surfaces for dashboard cards.
visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid strokes (border-border). Max border-radius is 8px (rounded-md) to maintain a sharp, authoritative B2B look.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Ambient diffuse shadows (shadow-sm) only. Do NOT use deep, heavy shadows.
visual_enhancers.textures: Apply subtle grain/noise overlays to large empty background sections to kill digital flatness.

marketing_page.hero: Agent-Native Showcase: Show the AI widget actively solving a business query in the hero. Use the Modern Reception Desk image with bg-black/40 overlay.
marketing_page.features: Bento Grid Protocol: Mode A (Tetris grid, asymmetrical).
marketing_page.marquee: Editorial Ribbon: Slow, smooth drift of customer categories using react-fast-marquee.

dashboard.layout: F-Pattern Layout. North Star Metric (e.g., Knowledge Score) in top-left. Left-sidebar navigation.
dashboard.cards: Dense, sharp edges, 1px subtle border. No generic drop shadows.
dashboard.charts: Shadcn Recharts customized. Line for trends (conversations), Bar for comparisons. Never show empty states; use CTAs.

chat_widget.ui: Floating pill-shaped button. The chat window uses Glassmorphism with sharp inner contrasts, explicit 'Human Handoff' button, and real-time streaming typography.

grids.marketing: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12 with wide gap-8 to gap-12. Leave intentional empty cells.
grids.dashboard: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with tight gap-4. Every pixel utilized, h-full on children.

layouts.spacing: Generous Spacing (Tailwind p-12 to p-24) for marketing sections. Internal container padding (p-6) must exist if borders are present.
layouts.alignment: Mobile-first. Optical alignment (adjust padding manually to balance icons). Grid items MUST be direct children.

motion.interactions: Hover states must explicitly change text color (e.g., hover:bg-primary hover:text-white). Focus states require ring-2 with higher contrast.
motion.transitions: Use specific properties (transition-transform duration-200 ease-out). NO 'transition: all'.
motion.micro_animations: Chat widget bounce, accordion smooth expand, slight card lift (-translate-y-1) on dashboard hover.

accessibility.contrast: Text over images needs text-shadow or gradient overlay.
accessibility.focus: Elements must be keyboard navigable with clear focus indicators.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST have role-based data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button').

media.icons: Use @phosphor-icons/react for premium, duotone aesthetic. No AI emojis (🤖🧠).
media.images: Use realistic, context-specific images. No placeholders. Max mobile height 80vh.

image_urls.description: Hotel reception desk with modern wooden furniture.

3d_libraries.recommendation: Maintain 2D layered depth with framer-motion for UI interactions. Use react-fast-marquee for logos.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Update tailwind.config.js with the provided light/dark colors and font families. 2. Build the Landing Page and Widget Customizer using .js/.jsx (no TSX). 3. Use Shadcn components for forms, inputs, selects, and dialogs. 4. Never use 'transparent' background for navbars if content scrolls under it; use glassmorphism. 5. Integrate sonner for toasts.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Do not use dark colors as gradients. Use solid colors.
Do not center-align the app container (.App { text-align: center; } is FORBIDDEN).
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) combined with a 1px border.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition (e.g., transition: all). Add specific transitions.
Always use modern button styles (pill-shaped or sharp) with clear hover and active interactions.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters (🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯).
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Ensure Javascript/JSX files (.js/.jsx) are used instead of TypeScript (.tsx).
